issues.description: Text says '[End of Your Turn]' but DSL uses 'Activated'. Should be 'EndOfTurn'.
Effect rests 'this Character' but card text does not mention resting this Character. Action should be removed.
Action uses 'GiveKeyword' with 'Rush' but text says 'set up to 1 Character as active' (activate/flip to active state). Should use 'Rest' with inverted logic or a custom 'Activate' action.
Target filter uses 'maxCost:2' but text specifies '{FILM} type Characters other than [Bartolomeo]'. Should filter by type and exclude Bartolomeo.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is inappropriate. Activating a Character is a permanent state change, not temporary. Should be 'Permanent'.
